## Meeting Purpose

[Strategic session to discuss content strategy and next steps for Airbyte's SEO efforts with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/XFCvZzxy-AXwyPxQzGxwkG5wskPqKNw_?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX conducted a keyword gap analysis, creating a Content OS with competitor-based keyword opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/XFCvZzxy-AXwyPxQzGxwkG5wskPqKNw_?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [Focus on balancing content refreshes and new content creation, starting with 2 articles to calibrate tone and style](https://fathom.video/share/XFCvZzxy-AXwyPxQzGxwkG5wskPqKNw_?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Prioritize data engineering resources and "how to sync" categories for content refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/XFCvZzxy-AXwyPxQzGxwkG5wskPqKNw_?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Aim for \~10 pieces of content per week (50/50 split between new and refreshed) with a 50,000 word/month limit](https://fathom.video/share/XFCvZzxy-AXwyPxQzGxwkG5wskPqKNw_?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Overview

  - [Keyword gap analysis conducted using competitor data](https://fathom.video/share/XFCvZzxy-AXwyPxQzGxwkG5wskPqKNw_?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [Content OS created with keyword opportunities grouped into logical clusters](https://fathom.video/share/XFCvZzxy-AXwyPxQzGxwkG5wskPqKNw_?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [Clusters include: data integration, analytics, pipelines, warehousing, APIs, governance, and quality](https://fathom.video/share/XFCvZzxy-AXwyPxQzGxwkG5wskPqKNw_?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Initial focus on refreshing existing content while also creating some new pieces](https://fathom.video/share/XFCvZzxy-AXwyPxQzGxwkG5wskPqKNw_?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [Cautious approach to capitalize on current rankings before expanding](https://fathom.video/share/XFCvZzxy-AXwyPxQzGxwkG5wskPqKNw_?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)

### Content Refresh Process

  - [Identify refresh opportunities (e.g., articles ranking 2-5 page range for relevant keywords)](https://fathom.video/share/XFCvZzxy-AXwyPxQzGxwkG5wskPqKNw_?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
  - [Three refresh types: wholesale rewrite, expansion-only, or hybrid approach](https://fathom.video/share/XFCvZzxy-AXwyPxQzGxwkG5wskPqKNw_?tab=summary&timestamp=1018.0)
  - [Use SEO testing tool to track performance of refreshed content cohorts](https://fathom.video/share/XFCvZzxy-AXwyPxQzGxwkG5wskPqKNw_?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Balance between new content and refreshes (aim for 50/50 split)](https://fathom.video/share/XFCvZzxy-AXwyPxQzGxwkG5wskPqKNw_?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)

### Priority Areas and Insights

  - [Data engineering resources and "how to sync" categories identified as key areas for refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/XFCvZzxy-AXwyPxQzGxwkG5wskPqKNw_?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Recent layout changes in "how to sync" category impacted rankings](https://fathom.video/share/XFCvZzxy-AXwyPxQzGxwkG5wskPqKNw_?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)
  - [Non-branded traffic declining due to search trends and Google's market share shift](https://fathom.video/share/XFCvZzxy-AXwyPxQzGxwkG5wskPqKNw_?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)
  - [Opportunity to expand on A to B connector pages and related use cases](https://fathom.video/share/XFCvZzxy-AXwyPxQzGxwkG5wskPqKNw_?tab=summary&timestamp=1256.0)

### Content Production and Workflow

  - [Start with 2-3 articles per week, ramping up to 5-10 as process is refined](https://fathom.video/share/XFCvZzxy-AXwyPxQzGxwkG5wskPqKNw_?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
  - [Target average of 1,500 words per article](https://fathom.video/share/XFCvZzxy-AXwyPxQzGxwkG5wskPqKNw_?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
  - [50,000 word monthly limit](https://fathom.video/share/XFCvZzxy-AXwyPxQzGxwkG5wskPqKNw_?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [Use SEO testing tool and Google Search Console for performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/XFCvZzxy-AXwyPxQzGxwkG5wskPqKNw_?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)

### Competitive Content Strategies

  - [Potential to expand on comparison articles and listicles](https://fathom.video/share/XFCvZzxy-AXwyPxQzGxwkG5wskPqKNw_?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
  - [Consider creating more alternatives content (e.g., "Airbyte vs. X" articles)](https://fathom.video/share/XFCvZzxy-AXwyPxQzGxwkG5wskPqKNw_?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)
  - [Evaluate lower-funnel content opportunities (e.g., pricing comparisons)](https://fathom.video/share/XFCvZzxy-AXwyPxQzGxwkG5wskPqKNw_?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Airbyte team to review Content OS and select 2 initial articles for production](https://fathom.video/share/XFCvZzxy-AXwyPxQzGxwkG5wskPqKNw_?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)
  - [GrowthX to deliver initial articles for review and feedback](https://fathom.video/share/XFCvZzxy-AXwyPxQzGxwkG5wskPqKNw_?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
  - [Weekly meetings to discuss progress and refine approach](https://fathom.video/share/XFCvZzxy-AXwyPxQzGxwkG5wskPqKNw_?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
  - [Gradually increase content production as tone and style are calibrated](https://fathom.video/share/XFCvZzxy-AXwyPxQzGxwkG5wskPqKNw_?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
  - [Add SEO testing tool details to Notion and Slack for easy reference](https://fathom.video/share/XFCvZzxy-AXwyPxQzGxwkG5wskPqKNw_?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
